description: Backup failure on Nov 8 due to cross-region network timeout. No re-run was executed for this backup cycle. Gap of approximately 48 hours between last successful backup (Nov 7) and next successful backup (Nov 9).
compensating_controls: WAL archiving confirmed continuously operational throughout the incident period. WAL segments were successfully archived to us-west-2 every 12-15 minutes during the outage window, providing continuous point-in-time recovery capability. Effective RPO maintained at approximately 15 minutes via WAL despite full backup gap.
notes: Cross-region network issue was transient. Network team confirmed link restored by 06:00 UTC Nov 8. On-call engineer acknowledged alert but assessed WAL archiving provided sufficient coverage. CISO reviewed and accepted risk given WAL continuity. Remediation: Added automated backup re-run trigger to runbook for future network-related failures.
